title: Counterintelligence/Human Intelligence Specialist
description: Conducts counterintelligence operations and human intelligence collection to identify threats and support commanders.

title: Intelligence Specialist
description: Collects, analyzes, and disseminates all-source intelligence to support Marine Corps operations.

title: Imagery Analysis Specialist
description: Analyzes imagery from various collection platforms to produce intelligence products.

title: Geographic Intelligence Specialist
description: Produces geospatial intelligence products and analysis to support maneuver and targeting.

title: Rifleman
description: Serves as the basic infantry fighting unit, locating, closing with, and destroying the enemy by fire and maneuver.

title: Light Armored Reconnaissance Marine
description: Operates and maintains the Light Armored Vehicle (LAV-25) to conduct reconnaissance and security operations.

title: Scout Sniper
description: Provides precision long-range fire and reconnaissance support for infantry units.

title: Reconnaissance Marine
description: Conducts deep reconnaissance, surveillance, and direct action missions in support of the MAGTF commander.

title: Machine Gunner
description: Employs machine guns and associated equipment in support of infantry operations.

title: Mortarman
description: Operates 60mm, 81mm, and 120mm mortar systems to provide indirect fire support for infantry units.

title: Infantry Assault Marine
description: Employs anti-armor weapons and breaching equipment to support infantry operations.

title: Antitank Missile Gunner
description: Operates the TOW missile system and other anti-armor weapons to destroy enemy armor and fortifications.

title: Critical Skills Operator
description: MARSOC special operations Marine who conducts direct action, special reconnaissance, and foreign internal defense missions.

title: Maintenance Management Specialist
description: Plans and manages unit-level maintenance programs, equipment readiness reporting, and maintenance records.

title: Logistics/Embarkation Specialist
description: Plans and executes unit embarkation and logistics operations for ground and maritime movement.

title: Airborne and Air Delivery Specialist
description: Plans and executes air delivery operations including parachute drops of personnel and equipment.

title: Landing Support Specialist
description: Coordinates the flow of personnel, equipment, and supplies across beaches and landing zones during amphibious operations.

title: MAGTF Planning Specialist
description: Assists in the planning and execution of Marine Air-Ground Task Force operations at the operational and strategic levels.

title: Tactical Switching Operator
description: Operates and maintains tactical telephone switching equipment to support command communications.

title: Transmission Systems Operator
description: Operates and maintains radio and multichannel transmission systems for tactical communications networks.

title: Satellite Communications Operator
description: Operates and maintains satellite communications terminals and systems supporting MAGTF operations.

title: Network Administrator
description: Installs, configures, and maintains tactical data networks and information systems.

title: Cyber Network Operator
description: Plans, installs, and operates cyberspace networks and systems to support Marine Corps mission command.

title: Data Systems Administrator
description: Manages and maintains data systems hardware, software, and networks supporting command operations.

title: Field Artillery Cannoneer
description: Operates and maintains towed and self-propelled cannon artillery systems to provide indirect fire support.

title: HIMARS Crewmember
description: Operates and maintains the High Mobility Artillery Rocket System (HIMARS) for long-range precision fires.

title: Field Artillery Radar Operator
description: Operates the AN/TPQ-46 and similar counter-battery radars to locate enemy artillery and mortar positions.

title: Field Artillery Fire Control Marine
description: Operates fire direction center equipment and software to compute and transmit firing data to artillery units.

title: Field Artillery Sensor Support Marine
description: Operates meteorological and survey equipment to support artillery targeting accuracy.

title: Fire Support Marine
description: Requests, coordinates, and adjusts indirect fire and close air support for ground maneuver units.

title: Electrician
description: Installs, maintains, and repairs electrical systems, wiring, and power distribution equipment.

title: Engineer Equipment Electrical Systems Technician
description: Repairs and maintains electrical systems on engineer and construction equipment.

title: Refrigeration and Air Conditioning Technician
description: Installs and repairs refrigeration, air conditioning, and environmental control systems.

title: Water Support Technician
description: Operates and maintains water purification and distribution equipment to provide potable water in field conditions.

title: Metal Worker
description: Performs welding, cutting, and fabrication of metal components to support engineering and maintenance operations.

title: Engineer Equipment Mechanic
description: Maintains and repairs heavy engineer equipment including bulldozers, cranes, and combat earthmovers.

title: Engineer Equipment Operator
description: Operates heavy construction and combat engineer equipment to support mobility, countermobility, and survivability.

title: Engineer Assistant
description: Assists in drafting, surveying, and construction planning for engineer projects.

title: Combat Engineer
description: Constructs and breaches obstacles, performs demolitions, and supports mobility operations in combat.

title: Bulk Fuel Specialist
description: Operates and maintains bulk fuel storage, transfer, and distribution systems to support MAGTF operations.

title: Cyberspace Warfare Operator
description: Conducts defensive and offensive cyberspace operations to protect networks and exploit adversary systems.

title: Armor Marine
description: Operates and maintains M1A1 Abrams main battle tanks in combined arms operations.

title: Assault Amphibious Vehicle Crewmember
description: Operates the AAV-P7/A1 assault amphibious vehicle to transport Marines from ship to shore and inland.

title: Amphibious Combat Vehicle Crewmember
description: Operates the Amphibious Combat Vehicle (ACV) to conduct ship-to-shore movement and land operations.

title: Small Arms Repairer/Technician
description: Inspects, maintains, and repairs rifles, pistols, machine guns, and other small arms.

title: Towed Artillery Systems Technician
description: Performs organizational and intermediate maintenance on towed artillery weapons systems.

title: Assault Amphibious Vehicle Repairer/Technician
description: Performs maintenance and repair on AAV hull, turret, drive train, and weapons systems.

title: Main Battle Tank Repairer/Technician
description: Performs organizational and intermediate maintenance on M1A1 main battle tanks.

title: Light Armored Vehicle Repairer/Technician
description: Maintains and repairs the LAV-25 and associated variants at organizational and intermediate levels.

title: Machinist
description: Operates machine tools to fabricate metal parts and components in support of maintenance operations.

title: Electro-Optical Ordnance Repairer
description: Repairs and calibrates electro-optical fire control systems, laser rangefinders, and night vision devices.

title: Ammunition Technician
description: Receives, stores, issues, and disposes of conventional ammunition and explosive ordnance.

title: Explosive Ordnance Disposal Technician
description: Locates, identifies, renders safe, and disposes of unexploded ordnance, IEDs, and CBRN devices.

title: Special Communications Signals Collection Operator/Analyst
description: Collects and analyzes signals intelligence from communications systems to support MAGTF operations.

title: Electronic Intelligence Analyst
description: Collects and analyzes electronic intelligence from non-communications emitters to identify and track threats.

title: Cryptologic Linguist Operator/Analyst
description: Uses foreign language skills to collect, translate, and analyze signals intelligence supporting MAGTF commanders.

title: Intelligence Surveillance Reconnaissance Systems Engineer
description: Operates and maintains intelligence collection systems and architectures for ISR mission support.

title: Middle East Cryptologic Linguist
description: Applies Arabic or other Middle Eastern language skills to collect and analyze signals intelligence.

title: Asia Pacific Cryptologic Linguist
description: Applies Asian Pacific language skills to collect and analyze signals intelligence for MAGTF support.

title: European Cryptologic Linguist
description: Applies European language skills to collect and analyze signals intelligence supporting operations.

title: Central Asian Cryptologic Linguist
description: Applies Central Asian language skills to collect and analyze signals intelligence for MAGTF support.

title: Digital Wideband Systems Maintainer
description: Installs and repairs digital wideband multichannel radio and satellite communications systems.

title: Ground Electronics Transmission Systems Maintainer
description: Maintains and repairs tactical radio and communications-electronics equipment at the organizational level.

title: Ground Electronics Telecommunications/IT Systems Maintainer
description: Repairs telephone systems, personal computers, and tactical IT infrastructure.

title: Calibration Technician
description: Tests, calibrates, and certifies precision measurement and test equipment used throughout the Marine Corps.

title: Artillery Electronics Technician
description: Maintains and repairs fire control electronics on howitzers and artillery rocket systems.

title: Supply Chain and Materiel Management Specialist
description: Manages supply requisitions, inventory accountability, and logistics information systems.

title: Distribution Management Specialist
description: Plans and executes transportation and distribution operations for materiel and personnel.

title: Food Service Specialist
description: Prepares, cooks, and serves food in garrison and field environments to support unit readiness.

title: Financial Management Resource Analyst
description: Analyzes and manages financial resources, budget execution, and fiscal accounting for Marine Corps units.

title: Automotive Maintenance Technician
description: Maintains and repairs wheeled vehicles including HMMWVs, trucks, and light armored vehicles.

title: Motor Vehicle Operator
description: Operates military wheeled vehicles to transport personnel, equipment, and supplies.

title: Combat Mass Communicator
description: Plans and produces multimedia content including articles, photos, video, and social media to support public affairs.

title: Combat Photographer
description: Documents Marine Corps operations and events through still photography for historical and public affairs use.

title: Combat Videographer
description: Captures and edits video footage of Marine Corps operations and events for historical and public affairs purposes.

title: CBRN Defense Specialist
description: Provides chemical, biological, radiological, and nuclear defense training and support to MAGTF units.

title: Military Police
description: Enforces laws and regulations, controls traffic, conducts law enforcement patrols, and maintains order.

title: Criminal Investigator (CID) Agent
description: Conducts felony criminal investigations involving Marine Corps personnel and assets.

title: Correctional Specialist
description: Supervises military prisoners and manages brig facilities to maintain security and rehabilitation programs.

title: Aviation Communication Systems Technician
description: Maintains and repairs aviation communication, navigation, and radar systems at intermediate maintenance level.

title: Aviation Radar Technician
description: Maintains and repairs airborne and ground radar systems supporting Marine Corps aviation.

title: Aviation Meteorological Equipment Technician
description: Maintains weather observation and meteorological equipment supporting aviation operations.

title: Air Traffic Control Navigational Aids Technician
description: Maintains ILS, TACAN, VOR, and other navigation aids supporting air traffic control operations.

title: Air Traffic Control Radar Technician
description: Maintains approach control and airport surveillance radar systems at Marine Corps air installations.

title: Air Traffic Control Communications Technician
description: Maintains communications equipment and systems used by air traffic control facilities.

title: Tactical Data Systems Technician
description: Maintains and repairs tactical data link and command and control systems for aviation operations.

title: Tactical Air Operations/Air Defense Systems Technician
description: Maintains tactical air operations center and air defense systems equipment supporting MAGTF aviation.

title: Aircraft Maintenance Data Specialist
description: Manages aviation maintenance data systems and records for Marine Corps aircraft.

title: Flight Equipment Technician
description: Inspects, maintains, and repairs aircrew flight equipment including parachutes, survival gear, and helmets.

title: Aircraft Intermediate Level Hydraulic/Pneumatic Mechanic
description: Repairs and overhauls hydraulic and pneumatic components for Marine Corps aircraft.

title: Support Equipment Electrician/Refrigeration and Engine Technician
description: Maintains aircraft ground support equipment including generators, hydraulic test stands, and cooling units.

title: Cryogenics Equipment Operator
description: Operates cryogenic liquid oxygen equipment to support aviation life support and propulsion systems.

title: Aircraft Intermediate Level Structures Mechanic
description: Repairs aircraft structural components including sheet metal, composites, and transparent areas.

title: Helicopter Mechanic
description: Performs organizational-level maintenance on helicopter airframes, systems, and components.

title: Helicopter Mechanic, CH-53
description: Performs organizational maintenance on CH-53E/K Super Stallion heavy-lift helicopter systems.

title: Helicopter Mechanic, UH/AH-1
description: Performs organizational maintenance on UH-1Y Venom and AH-1Z Viper helicopter airframes.

title: Tiltrotor Mechanic, MV-22
description: Maintains MV-22 Osprey tiltrotor aircraft airframe, systems, and components.

title: Helicopter Power Plants Mechanic
description: Maintains and repairs turbine engines and power plant systems on Marine Corps helicopters.

title: Helicopter/Tiltrotor Dynamic Components Mechanic
description: Maintains rotor systems, transmissions, and drive systems on helicopters and tiltrotor aircraft.

title: Helicopter Airframe Mechanic
description: Performs structural repairs and maintenance on helicopter airframes at organizational level.

title: Helicopter Crew Chief
description: Serves as aircrewmember responsible for in-flight maintenance monitoring and cargo/troop operations.

title: Tiltrotor Crew Chief, MV-22
description: Serves as aircrewmember on MV-22 Osprey responsible for aircraft systems monitoring and mission support.

title: Fixed-Wing Aircraft Mechanic, AV-8B
description: Performs organizational maintenance on AV-8B Harrier II airframe, systems, and components.

title: Fixed-Wing Aircraft Mechanic, F/A-18
description: Performs organizational maintenance on F/A-18 Hornet and Super Hornet aircraft systems.

title: Fixed-Wing Aircraft Mechanic, F-35B
description: Performs organizational maintenance on F-35B Lightning II short takeoff/vertical landing aircraft.

title: Fixed-Wing Aircraft Mechanic, KC-130
description: Performs organizational maintenance on KC-130J Hercules tanker/transport aircraft.

title: Fixed-Wing Aircraft Power Plants Mechanic
description: Maintains and repairs jet and turboprop engines on Marine Corps fixed-wing aircraft.

title: Fixed-Wing Aircraft Airframe Mechanic
description: Performs structural repair and maintenance on fixed-wing aircraft airframes at organizational level.

title: Fixed-Wing Aircraft Crew Chief, KC-130
description: Serves as aircrewmember on KC-130J responsible for aircraft systems, cargo, and in-flight refueling operations.

title: Fixed-Wing Aircraft Safety Equipment Mechanic
description: Inspects and maintains ejection seats, escape systems, and aircrew safety equipment.

title: Aircraft Communications/Navigation/Radar Systems Technician
description: Repairs and maintains avionics communication, navigation, and radar systems on Marine Corps aircraft.

title: Avionics/Maintenance Technician, Unmanned Aircraft Systems
description: Maintains avionics and airframe systems on Marine Corps unmanned aircraft systems.

title: Aircraft Communications/Navigation/Electrical Systems Technician
description: Maintains communications, navigation, and electrical avionics systems on Marine Corps aircraft.

title: Aircraft Electronic Countermeasures Systems Technician
description: Maintains electronic warfare and countermeasures systems on EA-6B Prowler and successor aircraft.

title: Aviation Electronic Microminiature/Instrument and Cable Repair Technician
description: Repairs microminiature circuit cards, instruments, and cables for Marine Corps aviation systems.

title: Aircraft Electrical/Instrument/Flight Control Systems Technician
description: Maintains electrical, instrument, and flight control systems on Marine Corps aircraft at intermediate level.

title: Aviation Precision Measurement Equipment/Calibration and Repair Technician
description: Tests and calibrates precision measurement equipment used in aviation maintenance operations.

title: Aircraft Ordnance Technician
description: Loads, maintains, and inspects aircraft weapons and ordnance systems on Marine Corps aircraft.

title: Aviation Ordnance Systems Technician
description: Performs intermediate-level maintenance on aviation weapons, ordnance delivery, and release systems.

title: Aviation Logistics Information Management and Support Specialist
description: Manages aviation logistics information systems, parts data, and supply support for Marine Corps aviation.

title: METOC Analyst Forecaster
description: Collects meteorological and oceanographic data and produces weather forecasts supporting aviation and ground operations.

title: Expeditionary Airfield Systems Technician
description: Installs and operates expeditionary airfield equipment including AM-2 matting, lighting, and MOGAS systems.

title: Aviation Operations Specialist
description: Manages flight scheduling, aviation records, and operations support for Marine Corps aviation units.

title: Aircraft Rescue and Firefighting Specialist
description: Responds to aircraft crashes and fires to rescue aircrew and suppress fires at Marine Corps air installations.

title: Low Altitude Air Defense Gunner
description: Operates Stinger missile and other MANPADS systems to protect ground forces from low-altitude air threats.

title: Tactical Air Defense Controller
description: Controls and coordinates air defense operations including identification and engagement of airborne threats.

title: Air Support Operations Operator
description: Coordinates close air support and other aviation assets in direct support of ground combat operations.

title: Air Traffic Controller
description: Provides air traffic control services including approach, departure, and tower control at Marine Corps airfields.

title: Unmanned Aerial Vehicle Operator
description: Operates UAV systems including RQ-7 Shadow and MQ-9 to conduct reconnaissance and surveillance missions.
